name: io.github.dokdosolutions-us/lucky
description: 🍀✨ MCP server for Clover POS — restaurant operations, inventory, orders, analytics, and retention

environmentVariables.name: CLOVER_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Clover merchant API access token (treat as secret; rotate via the Clover dashboard if exposed)

environmentVariables.name: CLOVER_MERCHANT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Clover merchant ID (the alphanumeric ID visible in the merchant dashboard URL)

environmentVariables.name: CLOVER_SANDBOX
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to use the Clover sandbox API (apisandbox.dev.clover.com). Defaults to false.
